Light and Transparent Composite Glass

BALLISTICAL TRANSPARENT AND LIGHT COMPOSITE GLASS (ALP01)

Standard ballistic shooting tests were performed on the developed transparent and light composite glass (ALP01) using hand gun and rifle bullets.  Experimental evaluation on the panels and the witness plates revealed successful ballistic protection according to the NIJ Standards.

Figure 2. BALLISTICAL TRANSPARENT AND LIGHT COMPOSITE GLASS (ALP01)
